abilities.description: Causes a bladestorm of destructive force around Juggernaut, rendering him immune to magic and dealing damage to nearby enemy units.
abilities.name: Blade Fury
abilities.story: Yurnero's renowned katana techniques are feared by warriors and sorcerers alike.

abilities.description: Summons a Healing Ward which heals all nearby allied units, based on their max health. The Healing Ward moves at 325 movement speed after being summoned. Lasts 2.5 seconds.
params: Max Health as Health Regen Bonus: 2%/3%/4%/5%
abilities.name: Healing Ward
abilities.story: Of the rituals learned at the Isle of Masks, tending wounds with a bit of voodoo magic has proven to be quite useful.

abilities.description: Gives Juggernaut a chance to deal critical damage on each attack.
abilities.name: Blade Dance
abilities.story: The last remnant of his heritage's commitment to bladework, Yurnero ensures that the style is remembered.

abilities.description: Performs a short Omnislash for 1 seconds.
abilities.name: Swiftslash

abilities.description: Juggernaut leaps towards the target enemy units, and then slashes the target and other nearby enemy units at an increased attack rate. Juggernaut is invulnerable for the duration.
abilities.name: Omnislash
abilities.story: ‘The fruits of discipline; with practice comes strength.’

description: Slices through his enemies with precise strikes. What laid under the Juggernaut's mask, none could say. The last of his kind, Yurnero carries alone the martial traditions of his native isle, now sunken forever beneath the waves. Dancing with his Blade, the Juggernaut elevates swordplay to an art form, Swiftly Slashing foes in an unstoppable Blade Fury, striking the most vulnerable spots. With skills honed to such perfection, Yurnero can keep on Slashing and Dashing between opponents while giving them absolutely no chance to retaliate even in the slightest. Their only option to escape this onslaught is to book it as quickly as possible. After eviscerating his foes, Yurnero places his portable mobile Healing Ward that emits meditative energies to revitalize himself and nearby allies.  Carry Pusher Escape  BadTeeth, Bearded, NicePecs Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Juggernaut's backstory and appearance bear many similarities to that of the Seguleh people in the "Malazan Book of the Fallen" series of books by Steven Erikson.
